entry.title: BEE IT Face Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Day Cream
Price: 10.00

Moisturizing and anti-age prevention face cream, with a soft and light texture, easy to apply. It has professional efficacy with 100% natural origin active ingredients NaturOxygen® and Pentavitin® EcoCert, Cosmos and Natrue certified, which increase metabolism and skin turnover, making the skin nourished, radiant and even younger. Enriched with Sodium Hyaluronate, Shea butter, Vitamin E, propolis and organic honey.

How to use: Apply and massage with circular movements to regenerate the skin, releasing your emotions.

Ingredients: Aqua, Helianthus annuus (Sunflower) seed oil, Cetearyl alcohol, Prunus amygdalus dulcis (Sweet almond) oil, Ethylhexyl palmitate, Cetearyl glucoside, Sorbitan olivate, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum [Fragrance], Butyrospermum parkii (Shea) butter, Glycerin, Cyamopsis tetragonoloba (guar) gum, Tocopheryl acetate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Citric acid, Coumarin, Limonene, Alpha-isomethyl ionone, Saccharide isomerate, Hydroxycitronellal, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax, Saccharomyces lysate, Disodium succinate, Sodium citrate, Glutamic acid, Glycine, Threonine, Valine.

* Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT Hand and Body Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Lotion
Price: 5.90

Moisturizing hand and body cream, soft and scented, exquisite for dry, reddened and in need of attention skin. Enriched with oils, vitamins, propoli and organic honey, it nourishes your skin making it supple, radiant and fragrant. Soft and light like a caress, it removes daily stress and promotes a pleasant feeling of relaxation in every part of your body and mind.

How to use: Use every day after a shower or bath on dry skin. Apply all over the body and massage gently until completely absorbed.

Ingredients: Aqua, Helianthus annuus seed oil, Glyceryl stearate SE, Cetearyl alcohol, Ethylhexyl palmitate, Parfum, Glycerin, Prunus amygdalus dulcis oil, Potassium sorbate, Sodium benzoate, Citric acid, Tocopheryl acetate, Mel*, Propolis, Coumarin, Limonene, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Alpha-isomethyl ionone, Hydroxycitronellal, Linalool, Geraniol, Isoeugenol.

* Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT SUN SPF50 Maya 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Tanning Oil & Lotion
Price: 9.90

High protection sun milk, effective and protecting the skin from both UVA and UVB rays. Suitable for sensitive skin and also suitable for kids under 3 years old. Protects skin against aging, sun spots and keeps skin hydrated.

Also effective in protecting the bees!

How to use: Apply to face/body before sun exposure until absorbed. Repeat the application frequently for a safe, even and long-lasting tan.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate, Octocrylene, Butyl methoxydibenzoylmethane, Methylene bis-benzotriazolyl tetramethylbutylphenol, Helianthus annuus (Sunflower) seed oil, Glyceryl stearate SE, Prunus amygdalus dulcis (Sweet almond) oil, Glycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Decyl glucoside, Tocopheryl acetate, Citric acid, Parfum [Fragrance], Ethylhexylglycerin, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice*, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Olea europaea (Olive) fruit oil*, Oryza sativa (Rice) bran oil, Vitis vinifera (Grape) seed oil, Allantoin, Propylene glycol, Xanthan gum, Vaccinium myrtillus (Myrtle) fruit extract, Avena sativa (Oat) kernel extract*, Calendula officinalis flower extract*, Sodium hydroxide, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT Shampoo & Body Wash for Kids Maya 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Shampoo
Price: 5.90

Physiological pH shampoo and body wash rich in natural ingredients to to enjoy the bath time as a pleasant experience of play and creativity. With organic aloe vera, sweet almond oil, organic honey and propolis, for a delicate and nourishing action.

Amused and clean, leaves hair velvety and luminous and skin soft.

How to use: Apply to hair and body and massage gently, then rinse.

Ingredients: Aqua, Magnesium lauryl sulfate, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Coco-glucoside, Glyceryl oleate, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Glycerin, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice*, Parfum, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate, Sodium chloride, Benzyl alcohol, Myristyl lactate, Prunus amygdalus dulcis oil, Helianthus annuus seed oil, Citric acid, Calendula officinalis extract, Dehydroacetic acid, Mel*, Propolis, Tocopherol.

*Organic

Natural product with physiological pH 4.5-5.5

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT Nourishing Shampoo 1000ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Shampoo
Price: 40.00

Nourishing shampoo for damaged hair and scalp. It cleanses with care, maintaining the original structure of the hair with an energetic action. The soft creamy texture creates a light lather with extra ordinary effectiveness for soft and vital hair.

How to use: Apply to wet scalp and hair, massaging gently. Rinse gently, inhaling and exhaling slowly.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Magnesium lauryl sulfate, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Xanthan gum, Glycerin, Disodium cocoamphodiacetate, Parfum [Fragrance], Sodium chloride, Benzyl alcohol, Citric acid, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Panthenol, Argania spinosa kernel oil, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Mel/Honey*, Coumarin, Limonene, Dehydroacetic acid, Alpha-isomethyl ionone, CI 19140 [Yellow 5].

*Organic

100% Natural Ingredients

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT Reconstruction Hair Mask 1000ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Conditioner
Price: 46.50

A concentrated repairing post shampoo mask which gratifies for its immediate effectiveness. Gives strength and elasticity, deeply hydrating and nourishing for a healthy, luminous and plumped up hair.

How to use: Apply after shampooing to towel-dried hair. Leave on for 5-10 minutes, then comb and rinse. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Behenamidopropyl dimethylamine, Cetearyl alcohol, Lactic acid, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Tocopheryl acetate, Sorbitol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Olea europaea fruit oil*, Opuntia ficus-indica seed oil, Glycerin, Myrtus communis extract, Panthenol, Hamamelis virginiana leaf extract*, Mel*, Propolis, Retinyl palmitate, Limonene, Linalool, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

100% Natural Ingredients

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

Price: 5.90

entry.title: BEE IT Regenerating Shower Gel 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Body Wash
Price: 4.90

Sensory body wash with naturally active biological ingredients with a regenerating action.
Promotes the natural feeling of well-being thanks to the beneficial properties of propolis and organic honey.

How to use: Apply all over the body. Rinse off, appreciating your moment.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Magnesium lauryl sulfate, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Parfum [Fragrance], Sodium chloride, Benzyl alcohol, Potassium sorbate, Sodium benzoate, Citric acid, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Coumarin, Limonene, Alpha-isomethyl ionone, Hydroxycitronellal, Dehydroacetic acid, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax.

*Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT Aftersun 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Tanning Oil & Lotion
Price: 8.90

Precious after-sun in a delicate and fresh gel texture, enriched with golden microspheres to even out the color of your skin with a soft luminescent touch. Natural formula with hyaluronic acid, inositol, acmella, organic honey and propolis for an effective moisturizing, antioxidant, regenerating and smoothing action. For deeply nourished and hydrated skin.

How to use: Apply to face/body after sun exposure, ready for the wow effect.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Polysorbate 20, Parfum [Fragrance], Carbomer, Mannitol, Phenoxyethanol, Microcrystalline cellulose, Sodium hydroxide, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Propanediol, CI 77492 [Iron oxides], CI 77491 [Iron oxides], Mica, Acmella oleracea extract, Acrylates/ammonium methacrylate copolymer, CI 77891 [Titanium dioxide], Tocopheryl acetate, Triethyl citrate, Caprylic/capric triglyceride, CI 77499 [Iron oxides], Titanium dioxide, Hydroxypropyl methylcellulose, Sodium hyaluronate, 1,2-Hexanediol, Simethicone, Inositol, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax.

*Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT SUN SPF30 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Tanning Oil & Lotion
Price: 7.90

Sun cream which protects, nourishes and hydrates the skin, favouring an intense and even tan. Organic Aloe Vera extract, combined with sweet almond oil, zinc oxide, vitamin E, organic honey and propolis, helps prevent premature aging caused by exposure to UV rays. For hydrated, supple, soft and enviably tanned skin.

How to use: Apply to face/body before sun exposure, repeating the application frequently for a safe, even and long-lasting tan.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate, Octocrylene, Butyl methoxydibenzoylmethane, Glyceryl stearate SE, Cetearyl alcohol, Helianthus annuus (Sunflower) seed oil, Prunus amygdalus dulcis (Sweet almond) oil, Methylene bis-benzotriazolyl tetramethylbutylphenol, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum [Fragrance], Decyl glucoside, Citric acid, Glycerin, Titanium dioxide, Tocopheryl acetate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Zinc oxide, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice*, Propylene glycol, Xanthan gum, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy
